offer: For non-profit finance teams processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient budget tracking causes cash flow gaps. We provide a budget planning app instead of manual spreadsheets and basic accounting software.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for non-profit finance teams
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on budgeting tools
DM outreach to non-profit finance teams with demo video
Participate in community forums for finance tool recommendations
try_it: Let users try Custom report generation and Spending aggregation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the app
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing budget data
Streamline onboarding steps for new users
